creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
FreeBSD 12.⋯
============

Whilst also thinking about this use case, and possible advice to change YES to NO where /boot/loader.conf includes this:


opensolaris_load="YES"


– I stumbled across (arm64) bug 240478 comment 9:

> After the switch to OpenZFS this line must be added to loader.conf:
> 
> cryptodev_load="YES"
